metadata.seed: Anyone ever have there SO push them away from depression to have them come back and continue to have a relationship? I’m in this situation now, and I want her back, but I want her to be happy with herself, and be able to deal with her depression even on the hardest days. Just didn’t know if anyone else was ever in this situation.

patient.query: Anyone ever have there SO push them away from depression to have them come back and continue to have a relationship? I’m in this situation now, and I want her back, but I want her to be happy with herself, and be able to deal with her depression even on the hardest days. Just didn’t know if anyone else was ever in this situation.

automatic_thoughts: I want her to be happy
I hope she can deal with her depression

neutral: Enduring personality change after psychiatric illness (finding)

llm_response.response: It sounds incredibly difficult to navigate this situation, wanting to support your partner while also wanting her back. What makes you believe she might return and want to continue the relationship?

validate_and_reflect.response: It sounds incredibly difficult to navigate this situation, wanting to support your partner while also wanting her to be happy and independent. It's understandable that you're reaching out and looking for connection and validation that others have experienced something similar.

socratic_questioning.response: It sounds incredibly difficult to navigate this situation, wanting to support your partner while also wanting her back. What makes you believe she might return and want to continue the relationship?

alternative_perspective.response: It sounds incredibly difficult to navigate this situation, wanting to support your partner while also wanting her back. It's understandable to wonder if others have experienced something similar, and it's brave of you to be so concerned for her well-being.

safety_check.response: It sounds incredibly painful to be experiencing this push-and-pull with your partner, and it's understandable that you'd want her to be happy and able to manage her depression. When you say you want her back, were you having any thoughts of hurting yourself or not wanting to be here?
